I tried over 10 Nigerian banking and fintech Apps including Paga, GT, One Bank, PiggyVest, Carbon etc to open a new Bank account. They all didnt work because a Nigerian phone number is required to open an account. This isnt a KYC requirement and can be simply fixed by integrating Twilio or Vonage for SMSWhatsApp to nonNigerian numbers, if you must use Phone number for authentication. Only App that worked was ALAT by Wema. With my BVN and NIN, I could set up an account and I have tier 3 account after BVN, NIN and address verification. Theres still a huge opportunity for a Fintech App that provides Nigerian banking for Nigerians abroad.
